CommunityApplications.Profile:
**Nvidia Status** — NVIDIA GPU dashboard + exporter that shows the **GDDR6/GDDR6X VRAM & junction temps `nvidia-smi` hides** on consumer RTX 30/40 cards, plus detailed stats including per‑Docker‑container resource usage.
Exports to Prometheus, JSON, MQTT/Home Assistant and InfluxDB (v1/v2) out of the box for long‑term analysis in Grafana. Reports temps + thresholds, clocks, power (with optional per‑GPU limit control), utilisation, VRAM, fan, PCIe + live bandwidth, throttle reasons, per‑process → container mapping and NVENC sessions. Multi‑GPU aware.
Requires the **Nvidia‑Driver** plugin.
Support via [GitHub issues](https://github.com/edddeduck/nvidia-status/issues).
